items.title: Update React to 19.2.5 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps React from version 19.2.4 to 19.2.5, incorporating important cycle protections for React Server Components. The changes were made in both the package.json and yarn.lock files to ensure consistency across the project. This upgrade enhances stability and performance for our frontend application.

items.title: New Research Cycle Insights in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: The latest research cycle for May 1, 2026, has been completed, adding a comprehensive report with 439 new entries. Key findings include 25 candidates reviewed, with 10 holds and 15 skips due to liquidity concerns. Notably, CHILLGOBLI is marked for a hold pending further observation, while several tokens were flagged as suspicious and skipped.
